text.p: How are you and how is your work , over there , I think is moving fine in good condition, If so let give thank to our almighty father at in heaven Amen. (Amen).

The main purpose 1 character written this letter to you is Just to tell you about of our last national population census in our area, through the census we are able to known the total population in aur area country , please I want you to come for the census because you are reducing the population of our country so for that, you reducing the incone of our country , to Becouse of popula lation in our country.
Please I want you to come before next term population p census , please try and take a excuise from your office and come and take your census in in your country.
Please I am totally disa- pointe through which you have not come home for the census in country all the worker has back to their country.
because have not come it has led us not have the under population in our area and als also our house and you have count out in area and e house.
Please do it by that next term again , becu because it reduce the Number of people in 1 word country. thanks
